settings.text: At Coverland, we believe peace of mind should come standard. That’s why our warranty is more than just fine print — it’s our promise to you. With long-lasting protection against wear, fading, and hardware issues, we stand firmly behind the products we create. When you choose Coverland, you’re choosing quality that lasts well beyond the road ahead.

settings.content:
Seat Cover Warranty — Up to 10 Years

At Coverland, we are committed to delivering seat covers that combine exceptional quality, comfort, and durability. We stand behind the craftsmanship of our products, offering a comprehensive warranty for up to 10 years from the date of purchase.

Warranty Coverage

Your warranty begins on the date of purchase and covers your product for up to 10 years, depending on its specific warranty term. Our warranty protects your seat cover against:

  1. Seam & Stitching Integrity — If stitching comes undone or seams split under normal use, we'll replace it.
  2. Material Defects — Covers issues like fraying, weak fabric, or construction flaws that affect performance.
  3. Premature Fading — Significant fading or discoloration under normal use within the warranty period.
  4. Fit & Attachment Hardware — Defects in straps, hooks, or elastic that prevent proper installation or secure fit.
  5. Padding or Foam Failure — Unusual flattening, bunching, or material breakdown that impacts comfort or function.

Warranty Term

The warranty coverage begins from the original date of purchase. If a product is replaced under warranty, the replacement does not reset or extend the coverage period — the warranty continues from the original purchase date.

How to Claim Your Warranty

If you experience an issue covered under this warranty:

  1. Contact Us — Reach our customer service team by phone or email with your order details and a short description of the issue.
  2. Provide Documentation — We may request photos or a brief video to help us evaluate your claim.
  3. Review & Approval — Our team will review your claim promptly.
  4. Replacement — If approved, a replacement seat cover will be shipped to you at no cost except for shipping.

Limitations & Exclusions

This warranty does not cover:

  1. Damage from misuse, neglect, or improper installation.
  2. Stains, spills, pet damage, burns, or cuts.
  3. Fading caused by prolonged unprotected exposure to extreme sunlight.
  4. Any alterations or modifications to the seat cover.

Our Promise to You

Your satisfaction is our priority. This warranty is our commitment to ensuring you can enjoy your Coverland seat covers with complete confidence.

Shipping fees are not included.

Starting from the second warranty claim, a restocking fee may apply.

Thank you for choosing Coverland. We value your trust and look forward to serving you for years to come.

Car Cover Warranty - Up to 10 Years

At Coverland, we are committed to providing our customers with exceptional quality products and peace of mind. We stand behind the craftsmanship and durability of our car covers, offering a comprehensive warranty for up to 10 years from the date of purchase.

Warranty Coverage

Our warranty protects your car cover against:

  1. Normal Wear & Tear — Protection if your car cover stops performing under normal conditions.
  2. Weather-Related Damage — Coverage for failure due to sun, rain, snow, hail, or other environmental exposure.
  3. Rips & Tears — If your car cover rips or tears during normal use, we'll replace it.

Warranty Term

The warranty coverage begins from the original date of purchase. If a product is replaced under warranty, the replacement does not reset or extend the coverage period — the warranty continues from the original purchase date.

How to Claim Your Warranty

If you experience an issue covered under this warranty:

  1. Contact Us — Reach our customer service team by phone or email with your order details and a short description of the issue.
  2. Provide Documentation — We may request photos or a brief video to help us evaluate your claim.
  3. Review & Approval — Our team will review your claim promptly.
  4. Replacement — If approved, a replacement car cover will be shipped to you at no cost except for shipping.

Limitations & Exclusions

This warranty does not cover:

  1. Damage from misuse, neglect, or improper installation.
  2. Alterations or modifications to the car cover.
  3. Damage caused by accidents, abuse, or neglect.

Our Promise to You

Your satisfaction is our priority. This warranty is our commitment to ensuring you can enjoy your Coverland car cover with complete confidence.

Shipping fees are not included.

Starting from the second warranty claim, a restocking fee may apply.

Thank you for choosing Coverland. We value your trust and look forward to serving you for years to come.

settings.heading: Need Further Assistance?
settings.subheading: Contact one of our Product Specialists Today!
settings.note: Our customer support services are available 7 days a week 9:00 AM to 5:30 PM PST.

settings.text:
FREE RETURNS

We offer 30-day hassle-free returns on all orders, including custom-fit products. If you’re not completely satisfied or simply changed your mind, contact our support team within 30 days of delivery and we’ll take care of the rest.

Email: support@coverland.com
Phone: (800) 799-5165

Every return initiated within 30 days of delivery includes a free prepaid return shipping label, with no restocking fees. Our team is happy to help with fit questions, installation guidance, or exchanges to ensure you get the right product for your vehicle.

Please do not return items to the original shipping carrier or fulfillment center. All returns must be sent to our California hub.

To complete your return or exchange, print and include the Return/Exchange Form with your shipment and send it to:

  • Coverland
  • 16111 Canary Ave
  • La Mirada, CA 90638

FREE EXCHANGES

If you wish to exchange an item purchased, please contact our Customer Service Department directly at (800) 799-5165. They will check the availability of the replacement item requested by you and further explain the steps needed to make the exchange.

Merchandise that is exchangeable can be returned by mailing to the address mentioned above. There are no additional fees for an exchange. Once the original item is received, the replacement merchandise will arrive to you within 2-3 business days.

RETURN INSTRUCTIONS

All return labels are sent via email in PDF file format, service provider will be FedEx/UPS unless otherwise stated.
Please allow 1 to 2 billing cycles for refunds to appear on your credit card statement.

INTERNATIONAL & NON-MAINLAND U.S. ORDERS

Orders shipped outside the U.S. mainland follow this return policy:

Alaska, Hawaii, and U.S. Territories (American Samoa, Guam, the Northern Mariana Islands, Puerto Rico, and the U.S. Virgin Islands):

Returns are accepted within 30 days of delivery. Customers are responsible for return shipping costs.

All other international destinations:
Returns are not accepted.

settings.text:
Secure Shopping

Browse and purchase our products in complete security. Rest assured that all your personal information will be kept safe, secure, and protected at all times within our SSL encrypted domain.

Effective date: January 1, 2024

This privacy policy states how Coverland uses and protects any information that you give Coverland when you use this website. Coverland is committed to ensuring that your privacy is protected. Should we ask you to provide certain information by which you can be identified with when using this website, you can be assured that it will only be used in accordance with this privacy statement.

Coverland may change this policy at any time by updating this page. Frequently, check this page to ensure you are up to date with our website's policies. Your use of this website is also governed by our Terms & Conditions.

What we collect

When you visit our Website, we automatically collect certain information about your web browser, IP address, time zone, and some of the cookies that are installed on your device. Additionally, as you browse our Website, we collect information about web pages or products that you view, the websites or search terms that referred you to our Website, as well as information concerning how you interact with our Website.

When you make a purchase or attempt to make a purchase through our Website, we also collect certain information from you, including your name, billing address, shipping address, email address, and phone number. This personal information that identifies, relates to, describes, references, or is capable of being associated with, or could reasonably be linked, directly or indirectly, with a particular consumer or device herein is collectively referred to as “data.”

In the past twelve (12) months, the categories of personal information that we have collected from consumers visiting this website include:

  1. Contact information, such as name, postal address, email address, phone number.
  2. Online identifiers, such as username and IP address.
  3. Usage information, such as how you and your device interact with our website (e.g., the pages you visit, the search terms you enter).
  4. We have collected such personal information solely from the following categories of sources:
  5. A. Directly from customers when engaged in transactions through this website or other manner of direct communications.
  6. B. Directly and indirectly from activity on our website (www.Coverland.com). For example, from requests through our website portal or website usage details collected automatically.

What we do with the information we gather

The data we collect from customers is used to fulfill orders placed through our Website, which includes the processing of payment information, preparing orders for shipment, and providing order confirmations and other order-related communication. In addition, we will use data from your visit to our Website to improve and optimize the customer experience, to screen for potential risk and fraud, to provide the most relevant advertisements and email communications to you, and to assess the success of our current marketing and advertising campaigns. Pursuant to General Data Protection Regulations (GDPR), we are considered a “controller” of data and we may engage third party “processors” of data.

We may use or disclose the data we collect for one or more of the following business purposes:

  1. To fulfill or meet the reason for which the information is provided. For example, we will use address information you provide us in order to have the product delivered to you.
  2. To provide you with information concerning our products or services that you request or consent to receiving from us.
  3. To carry out our obligations and enforce our rights arising from any sales transactions entered into between you and us, including billing and collections.
  4. To improve our website and present its contents better to you.
  5. For testing, research, analysis and product development.
  6. To respond to law enforcement requests and as required by applicable law, court order, or governmental regulations.

Text Message Communications (SMS/MMS)

By voluntarily providing your mobile phone number to Coverland through our website or other channels (such as checkout, pop-up forms, or opt-in fields), you consent to receive text messages (SMS and/or MMS) from us. These messages may include, but are not limited to: promotional offers, order and shipping updates, abandoned cart reminders, and product announcements.

Consent to Receive Text Messages

When you opt in to receive text messages from Coverland, you agree to receive recurring automated marketing and transactional messages at the mobile number provided. Consent to receive automated messages is not a condition of purchase.

We may use SMS/MMS messaging to:

  1. Communicate order confirmations, shipping notifications, or support updates;
  2. Provide exclusive promotional offers, sales alerts, or marketing content;
  3. Follow up with cart or browse abandonment reminders;
  4. Request customer feedback or product reviews.

Opting Out

You may opt out of receiving SMS/MMS messages at any time. To unsubscribe:

  1. Reply STOP to any SMS message from us to cancel.
  2. For customer service or additional help, reply HELP or email us at support@coverland.com.

After opting out, you may receive a confirmation message confirming your opt-out request. No further marketing messages will be sent to your mobile number unless you re-subscribe.

Message Frequency & Charges

  1. Message frequency will vary based on your interactions with us.
  2. Message and data rates may apply, depending on your mobile carrier plan.
  3. Coverland is not responsible for any messaging or data charges incurred from SMS communications.

Data Use and Privacy

Your mobile number and any associated message content will be handled in accordance with this Privacy Policy. We do not sell, rent, or share your mobile number with unaffiliated third parties for their own marketing purposes.

We may use third-party messaging platforms to send and manage SMS communications. These providers are contractually obligated to comply with applicable privacy and communications regulations, including the TCPA and CTIA guidelines.

Eligibility and Carrier Disclaimer

By subscribing to our SMS messaging program, you represent that:

  1. You are the account holder or authorized user of the mobile number provided.
  2. You are at least 18 years of age or have obtained parental consent.

Participating carriers are not liable for delayed or undelivered messages.

Your Rights

Through your access of our Website and provision of data as described herein, you have provided your consent for our use and collection of your data. However, in the event you change your mind, and no longer wish that we utilize your data, you may withdraw your consent for us to contact you, for the continued collection, use or disclosure of your information at any time, or modify your contact information, by contacting us at support@coverland.com and indicate on the subject line, "Privacy Compliance" or by mailing us at: CoverLand, 1800 E Walnut Ave Fullerton, CA 92831, Attention: Privacy Compliance.

Data Subject Request (DSR): To access or delete your data, submit your request through our Data Subject Request form. This secure form allows you to exercise your privacy rights regarding your personal information.

If you are a California resident, the California Consumer Privacy Act of 2018 (the “CCPA”) provides California residents with certain rights as to personal information maintained by businesses subject to the statute. Those rights include the following:

  1. The right to request disclosure of personal information, including the categories of personal information collected, the source of the personal information, any use made of the personal information, and, if personal information was disclosed or sold to third parties, the categories of such personal information and the categories of third parties to whom such information was disclosed or sold
  2. The right to request a copy of the specific personal information collected about the requesting individual during the 12 months before the request;
  3. The right to request that personal information not be sold to third parties; and
  4. The right not to be discriminated on the basis of having asserted privacy rights.

California residents may make a request for their personal information to any business subject to the CCPA twice within a twelve-month period. The responding business will need to obtain information from the requesting party so that it can verify their identity. The business must respond within forty-five (45) days of receiving a request for personal information. If you would like to exercise these rights, If you would like to exercise these rights, please email us at support@coverland.com and indicate on the subject line: “Privacy Rights.”

If you are a European resident, you have the right to access personal information we hold about you and to ask that your personal information be corrected, updated, or deleted. If you would like to exercise this right, please contact us support@coverland.com and indicate on the subject line, “Privacy Compliance,” or by mailing us at: Coverland, 1800 E Walnut Ave Fullerton, CA 92831, Attention: Privacy Compliance.

In addition, European residents who believe any concerns regarding their data have not been adequately addressed by us may lodge a complaint with the supervisory authority of their particular Member State, as defined under GDPR Chapter 6.

Data Retention

Coverland is located in the United States. By submitting your data through our Website, you agree to the transfer, storing and processing of your data, which, depending on the use of third-party services, may be processed, transferred and stored outside of the country where you reside. When you place an order through our Website, we will take reasonable steps to ensure that your data is treated securely and in accordance with this Privacy Policy.

How we use cookies

We, and third parties we allow, use cookies and other similar technologies. Cookies are small text files placed on your device that uniquely identify your device and which a website can transfer to a consumer’s hard drive to keep records of the consumer’s visit to a website. We, or third parties, may use session cookies or persistent cookies. Session cookies only last for the specific duration of your visit and are deleted when you close your browser. Persistent cookies remain on your device’s hard drive until you delete them or they expire. Different cookies are used to perform different functions, which are explained below:

  1. Essential. Some cookies are essential in order to enable you to move around our website and use its features, such as accessing secure areas of our website. Without these cookies, we cannot enable appropriate content based on the type of device you are using.
  2. Analytics. We use Google Analytics to measure how you interact with our website and to improve your user experience. To learn more about Google Analytics privacy practices and opt-out mechanisms, please visit the Google Analytics Security and Privacy Principles page at https://support.google.com/analytics/answer/6004245?hl=en. Google also provides a complete privacy policy and instructions on opting out of Google Analytics at https://tools.google.com/dlpage/gaoptout.
  3. Targeted Advertising. We use cookies to compile information on our users’ interactions with our website. We use this information to serve ads to you off of our website.

There are several ways to manage cookies. You can control the use of cookies at the browser level, by instructing your browser to accept cookies, disable cookies, or notify you when receiving a new cookie. Please note that if you reject cookies, you may still use our website, but your ability to use some features or areas of our website may be limited. The Network Advertising Initiative also offers a means to opt-out of a number of advertising cookies. Please visit www.networkadvertising.org to learn more.

Online Store and Third Party Services

Our store partners with payment providers to facilitate the sale of our products and services to you. Your data is stored through these databases and applications. They store your data on a secure server behind a firewall. If you choose a direct payment through our store to complete your purchase, then our partner(s) stores your credit card data. It is encrypted through the Payment Card Industry Data Security Standard (PCI-DSS). Your purchase transaction data is stored only as long as necessary to complete your purchase transaction. Once complete, your purchase transaction information is deleted. All direct payment gateways adhere to the standards set by PCI-DSS, as managed by the PCI Security Standards Council, which is a joint effort of brands like Visa, MasterCard, American Express and Discover. PCI-DSS requirements help ensure the secure handling of credit card information by our store and its service providers.

When you click on links on our Website, they may direct you away from our Website. We are not responsible for the privacy practices of other sites and encourage you to read their privacy statements. Once you leave our Website or are redirected to a third-party website or application, you are no longer governed by this Privacy Policy.

Disclosure of your information

We do not sell, trade, rent or disclose your data to third parties, except as provided herein:

  1. We will disclose Data (i) if it is required by law enforcement or judicial authorities, or to cooperate with a law enforcement investigation; (ii) if we have a good faith belief that we are required or permitted to do so by law or legal process; (iii) to protect our rights, reputation, property, or the safety of us or others; (iv) to defend or enforce our rights or your obligations; (v) if the disclosure is required by mandatory professional standards; (vi) to a third party with your prior consent; (vii) if we are under a duty to disclose or share your Data in order to enforce or apply any contracts or agreements that may exist between you and us, including this Privacy Policy and our Terms of Service found on our Website; and/or (viii) if we are required to exchange information with other companies and organizations for the purposes of fraud protection and credit risk reduction.
  2. We obtain support through third party service providers to maintain our Website, offer our products for sale, process customer orders, and deliver products. For example, we must release your credit card information to the card-issuing bank to confirm payment for products and services purchased on our Website and we provide order information to third parties that may package and deliver your product order including your address, name, phone if required for delivery, order totaled, and what was ordered.
  3. In the event we sell our stock or assets to an acquiring entity or merges with another entity, we reserve the right to provide your data to the acquiring or surviving entity.

Data Security

To protect your personal information, we take reasonable precautions and follow industry best practices to make sure it is not inappropriately lost, misused, accessed, disclosed, altered or destroyed. If you provide us with your credit card information, the information is encrypted using secure socket layer technology (SSL) and stored with an AES-256 encryption. We follow all PCI-DSS requirements and implement additional generally accepted industry standards.

Unfortunately, no data transmission over the Internet or any wireless network can be guaranteed to be 100% secure. As a result, while we strive to protect your data, you acknowledge that: (a) there are security and privacy limitations of the Internet that are beyond our control; (b) the security, integrity, and privacy of any and all information and data exchanged between you and us through our Website cannot be guaranteed and we shall have no liability to you or any third party for loss, misuse, disclosure or alteration of such information; and (c) any such information and Data may be viewed or tampered with in transit by a third party.

In the unlikely event that we believe the security of your data in our control may have been compromised, we will try to notify you. To the extent you have provided us with your email address, we may notify you by email and you agree to our use of email as a means of such notification. If you prefer for us to use another method to notify you in this situation, please contact us using the information contained in Section 3, above, with the alternative contact information you wish to be used.

Do not track disclosures

Some websites have "do not track" features that allow users to instruct a website not to track them. These features are not all uniform. We do not currently respond to those signals; however, our marketing partners may be members of the Network Advertising Initiative or the Digital Advertising Alliance, which have agreed to honor consumers' opt-out preferences submitted through those organizations' websites. To learn more about your choices regarding this type of data collection or to opt out of interest-based advertising by members of the NAI or the DAA, please visit the choices websites of the NAI and DAA at https://www.aboutads.info You also may locate Google Analytics' currently available opt-outs for the web here: https://tools.google.com/dlpage/gaoptout/. You can obtain more information about how to opt-out of Adobe Analytics here: http://www.adobe.com/privacy/opt-out.html.

Age of Consent

We are not a site targeted at children or those under the age of 16. By using our Website, you represent that you are at least the age of majority in your country, state or province of residence, or that you are the age of majority in your country, state or province of residence and you have given us your consent to allow any of your minor dependents to use our Website.

Changes to this privacy policy

We reserve the right to modify this Privacy Policy at any time, so please review it frequently. Changes and clarifications will take effect immediately upon their posting on our Website. If we make material changes to this Privacy Policy, we will notify you here that it has been updated, so that you are aware of what information we collect, how we use it, and under what circumstances, if any, we use and/or disclose it.

Choice of law

This Policy has been made in and shall be construed in accordance with the laws of the State of California, without giving effect to any conflict of law principles.

Contact us

If you have any questions, comments, or concerns about our privacy practices or this Policy, please contact us at:

  • Coverland
  • 1800 E Walnut Ave
  • Fullerton, CA 92831
  • support@coverland.com

settings.heading: Need Further Assistance?

settings.text:
Free Shipping

We make shipping simple! All items on Coverland.com are shipped from our warehouse in California. Orders placed before 11am PT will ship on the same day, from Tuesday-Saturday. Weekend orders placed after 11am PT on Saturday will ship on Monday. Orders placed on Monday will ship on Tuesday.

Once shipped, packages will normally be delivered within 1-5 business days based on your location.

We primarily ship with FedEx/UPS for fast, reliable service. In some cases, USPS may be used for certain U.S. destinations.

Orders of $75 or more going to the Contiguous United States ship free. For orders under $75, shipping rates are based on your destination zip code and city, and are calculated at checkout.

International Shipping

We are currently offering international orders for Canada only.

AK, HI, PR, VI, Guam, APO & FPO Addresses

Unfortunately, free shipping does not apply to Alaska, Hawaii, Puerto Rico, Virgin Islands, Guam, APO, or FPO addresses. Rates for these locations will be shown at checkout.

settings.subheading: For over 20 years, Coverland has offered car covers, seat covers, and many other accessories, helping us become an industry leader in premium automotive accessories. We cover vehicles ranging from cars and trucks to more.
settings.title: COVERLAND
settings.text: We care for your vehicle just as you do! All our resources are dedicated to providing you with an unforgettable experience through superior service and products.

settings.title: REASONABLE
settings.description: Get exceptional quality products at a highly affordable price range that won't weigh heavily on your pocket.

settings.title: LIMITLESS OPTIONS
settings.description: We design specialized products to fit all kinds of vehicles. You name it; we make it happen!

settings.title: WE VALUE YOU
settings.description: Take a look at all the honest reviews and feedback on our products provided by our valued customers.

settings.subheading: For over 20 years, Coverland has offered car covers, seat covers, and many other accessories, helping us become an industry leader in premium automotive accessories. We cover vehicles ranging from cars and trucks to more.
settings.title: OUR SUCCESS STORY
settings.text: Originally built from a garage in sunny California, we have grown from being one of the first online distributors into a global brand. Our success is owed to our dedicated and highly qualified team of professionals, who are as passionate about cars as any car enthusiast. Most importantly, we believe in caring for your vehicle as if it were our own. This is why, from production and purchase to delivery, we have taken every step to ensure that you receive high-quality items that fit seamlessly and are convenient for everyday use.
